schema.name: BitSightCompanyDetails_CL
schema.description: The BitSightCompanyDetails table merges portfolio company records (RecordType='Portfolio') and full company snapshots (RecordType='Detail') from the BitSight API per company GUID ingested into Microsoft Sentinel.

columns.name: record_type
columns.description: Source of the record: 'Portfolio' for basic portfolio info, 'Detail' for full company snapshot.

columns.name: guid
columns.description: Unique identifier (GUID) for the company in BitSight.

columns.name: name
columns.description: Name of the company.

columns.name: company_type
columns.description: The type of entity (e.g., Company, Government).

columns.name: industry
columns.description: Industry sector. Portfolio: {name, slug} object. Detail: plain string.

columns.name: sub_industry
columns.description: Sub-industry classification. Portfolio: {name, slug} object. Detail: plain string.

columns.name: primary_domain
columns.description: Primary internet domain of the company.

columns.name: shortname
columns.description: [Portfolio] Short name of the company.

columns.name: network_size_v4
columns.description: [Portfolio] Number of IPv4 addresses in the company network.

columns.name: industry_slug
columns.description: [Detail] URL-friendly identifier for the industry.

columns.name: sub_industry_slug
columns.description: [Detail] URL-friendly identifier for the sub-industry.

columns.name: homepage
columns.description: [Detail] URL of the company homepage.

columns.name: description
columns.description: [Detail] Description of the company.

columns.name: ipv4_count
columns.description: [Detail] Number of IPv4 addresses attributed to the company.

columns.name: rating
columns.description: [Portfolio] Current overall BitSight security rating.

columns.name: rating_date
columns.description: [Portfolio] Date of the most recent rating calculation (YYYY-MM-DD).

columns.name: sparkline
columns.description: URL to rating sparkline image.

columns.name: custom_id
columns.description: Customer-assigned identifier for the company.

columns.name: country
columns.description: [Detail] Country where the company is headquartered.

columns.name: country_slug
columns.description: [Detail] URL-friendly identifier for the country.

columns.name: grade
columns.description: [Detail] Letter grade for the company overall rating.

columns.name: grade_color
columns.description: [Detail] Hex color code associated with the grade.

columns.name: industry_grade
columns.description: [Detail] Letter grade relative to industry peers.

columns.name: confidence
columns.description: [Detail] Confidence level of the rating (0.0-1.0).

columns.name: tags
columns.description: Array of user-defined tags applied to the company.

columns.name: ConnectorName
columns.description: Connection name identifier for multi-instance tracking.
